title: Google Cloud Dataflow Pipeline Description
description: A descriptive representation of a Dataflow pipeline, providing structural information about the stages and transforms in the pipeline graph.

originalPipelineTransform.description: Description of each transform in the pipeline as provided by the user.

executionPipelineStage.description: Description of each stage of execution after the pipeline has been optimized by the service.

TransformSummary.description: Description of a transform executed as part of a Dataflow job.

id.description: SDK-generated unique identifier of the transform.

outputCollectionName.description: User names for the output collections of this transform.

inputCollectionName.description: User names for the input collections of this transform.

ExecutionStageSummary.description: Description of a stage of execution after pipeline optimization.

name.description: Dataflow service generated name for this stage.

id.description: Dataflow service generated unique ID for this stage.

componentTransform.description: Transforms that comprise this execution stage.

name.description: Dataflow service generated name for this transform.

originalTransform.description: User name for the original user transform.

componentSource.description: Collections produced and consumed by component transforms.

name.description: Dataflow service generated name for this source.

originalTransformOrCollection.description: User name for the original transform or collection.

prerequisiteStage.description: Other stages that must complete before this stage can run.

StageSource.description: Describes a stream of data that flows in or out of a stage.

name.description: Dataflow service generated name for this source.

originalTransformOrCollection.description: User name for the original transform or collection.

sizeBytes.description: Size of the source in bytes, if known.

DisplayData.description: Data provided with a pipeline or transform for descriptive information.

key.description: The key identifying the display data.

namespace.description: The namespace for the key, usually a class name.

strValue.description: Contains value if the data is of string type.

int64Value.description: Contains value if the data is of int64 type.

floatValue.description: Contains value if the data is of float type.

javaClassValue.description: Contains value if the data is of java class type.

timestampValue.description: Contains value if the data is of timestamp type.

durationValue.description: Contains value if the data is of duration type.

boolValue.description: Contains value if the data is of bool type.

shortStrValue.description: A possible additional shorter value to display.

label.description: An optional label to display with the value.
